narrative:
Sandusky County has 38,639 registered voters, with 56.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.1 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 31.2% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -6.4% D−R vs -20.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
